oai_dc:dc.dc:title: 2022 Parrot Lover’s Cruise
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Howland, Zoe
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 50 Number 1 (January 2023).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.article and pictures by Zoe HowlandEditor’s Note: Article printed with permission of the author and the Quaker Parakeet Society (QPS) Article was first printed in the QPS Sentinel Journal Winter 2022-23In November of 2022 I had the great fortune to go on a Princess Cruise ship to the Panama Canal area. This was a trip that had been planned for about a year. The group I was with were fellow parrot lovers. The cruise was planned and orchestrated by Carol Cipriano of Carol’s Travel Time. This was the fourteenth group cruise which Carol has organized.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 50 No. 1 (2023): Watchbird January 2023; 10-11
